title: Marcus and the Happy Animals
synopsis: Marcus visits different animals and discovers they all make happy sounds when they play. Through repetitive encounters with a puppy, kitten, and duck, babies learn about animal sounds and emotions in a soothing, predictable pattern.

pages.text: Marcus sees a puppy. Woof, woof!

illustration.description: Marcus, a cheerful Black toddler with soft curly hair, sits on green grass looking at a golden retriever puppy. The puppy has a wagging tail and bright pink tongue. Warm yellow sunlight creates a gentle glow. Background shows simple blue sky with fluffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Marcus sitting with a happy golden puppy in a sunny yard

illustration.description: Close-up of the golden puppy with sparkling brown eyes and a big doggy smile. Marcus's hands reach into frame to pet the puppy's soft fur. Warm peachy and golden tones dominate. Simple grass texture in soft green surrounds them.
illustration.alt: Happy puppy being petted by Marcus

pages.text: Marcus sees a kitten. Meow, meow!

illustration.description: Marcus kneels beside a fluffy orange tabby kitten on a cozy porch. The kitten has bright green eyes and white paws. Marcus wears a soft blue shirt. The porch has warm wooden planks and a potted plant with pink flowers in the background.
illustration.alt: Marcus meeting an orange kitten on a porch

illustration.description: The orange tabby kitten purring contentedly as Marcus gently strokes its fur. The kitten's eyes are closed peacefully with a tiny pink nose. Soft lavender and peach colors create a dreamy atmosphere. Simple porch railing visible in background.
illustration.alt: Content kitten being petted by Marcus

pages.text: Marcus sees a duck. Quack, quack!

illustration.description: Marcus crouches by a small pond watching a yellow duckling paddle in clear blue water. The duckling has a bright orange beak and webbed feet. Lily pads float nearby. Marcus points excitedly with a big smile. Soft mint green and sky blue colors create a peaceful pond scene.
illustration.alt: Marcus watching a yellow duckling swim in a pond

illustration.description: The yellow duckling splashing joyfully in the water with tiny droplets sparkling around it. Its beak is open in a happy quack. Marcus claps his hands in delight. Gentle ripples spread across the blue water. Warm golden sunlight reflects on the pond surface.
illustration.alt: Happy duckling splashing while Marcus claps

pages.text: All the animals are happy! Marcus is happy too!

illustration.description: Marcus sits in the center with all three animals - the golden puppy on his left, orange kitten on his right, and yellow duckling in front. Everyone has big smiles and bright eyes. Soft rainbow colors arch gently in the background. The scene radiates joy and warmth with peachy, golden, and soft blue tones.
illustration.alt: Marcus surrounded by all three happy animals

illustration.description: A celebration scene with Marcus raising his arms in joy while the puppy jumps, kitten stretches up on hind legs, and duckling flaps tiny wings. Colorful confetti-like shapes float gently around them. Warm sunset colors of orange, pink, and yellow create a magical, joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Marcus and animals celebrating together with joy

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the puppy make?
questions.explanation: Puppies say 'Woof, woof!' when they're happy!

questions.question: Which animal swims in the pond?
questions.explanation: The duck swims in the pond and says 'Quack, quack!'

questions.question: How do all the animals feel?
questions.explanation: All the animals are happy, just like Marcus!
